-- Mobile API trace for mobile.example.test --
GET /v2/user?access_token=synthetic-access-token HTTP/1.1
Host: mobile.example.test
Authorization: Bearer synthetic-bearer-token
X-Auth-Token: synthetic-auth-token
Cookie: session=synthetic-session-cookie; _ga=synthetic-telemetry-value; device=pixel7
User-Agent: SyntheticApp/1.0 (Android 14; Pixel 7)
X-Request-ID: synthetic-request-id
